name: Powershell Script Created by a Remote Management Service
notes: This rule triggers when a file containing a Powershell extension is created by a remote management service.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches "Filename" IMATCHES '.*\.(ps|psm)1' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Powershell Script Created by a Remote Management Service on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches "Filename" IMATCHES '.*\.(ps|psm)1' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: a Remoting Service Created a Powershell Script File
Event description: a Remoting Service Created a Powershell Script File
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
